pre_game.message: Hey C, I'm J—nice to meet you. I heard about this game and it sounds like a fun chance to win some cash; what brought you here today?
Hey J, nice to meet you too! I heard about this game as a chance to win some money and I'm super determined to bring home a win for me and my loved ones—what about you?
Oh, totally the same for me, C—I'm here to win big and support my family and friends, it's gonna be awesome if we pull it off!
Yeah, J, it's motivating to hear that—we're both in it for the right reasons! What's your take on how we might work together in the game?

Oh, for sure, C—I'm all about teamwork in this game; maybe we could share some strategies early on and watch each other's backs to maximize our chances without tipping off everyone else. What are your thoughts?
Sounds great, J—I'm on board with sharing strategies discreetly; let's start with something simple like coordinating our moves early—got any specific ideas in mind?
Yeah, C, one simple idea could be agreeing on a signal, like nodding if we think it's time to hold back early—does that sound workable to you?
Yeah, J, that sounds workable—I like the nodding idea as a subtle signal to hold back early; it could help us stay coordinated without anyone noticing.
Sweet, C, I'm glad you're into the nodding signal too—let's keep an eye out for the right moments and maybe chat more about backup plans once the game starts.
Yeah, J, that sounds solid—let's stay sharp and talk more when the game kicks off.
Yeah, C, let's crush it—looking forward to teaming up in the game!
Hey, I'm J—nice to meet you! I heard about this Simco game and I'm pretty pumped about the chance to win some money; it could make a real difference for me and my folks. What brought you here?
Hey J, it's great to meet you again—I'm C, and I'm here for the same reason, to win some money for my family and friends; let's make it happen in the game!
Hey C, that's the spirit—let's team up and win big for our families!
